sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68867" key="mounogenh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μουνο-γενής</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μουνό-γονος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μουνό-λιθος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μουνο-μήτωρ</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μουνο-τόκος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μουνόω</orth>, etc., <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">μονο</itype>-.</entryFree>
